G

Game - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
Class Game Description: This class manages the state and behavior of the game.

Constructor for the Game class.

Controller to manage the game GUI.

GameController - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Controller
The GameController class implements the Controller interface to manage game-related logic and interactions.

Constructs a new GameController.
gameIdColumn - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.LobbyGUIController
 
GameJoinedMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
Message sent from server to client when the client successfully joins a game.
GameJoinedMessage(int, int, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.GameJoinedMessage
Constructs a GameJoinedMessage with the specified client ID, game ID, and nickname.
GameManager - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
Class GameManager Description: This class manages the lifecycle of games.
GameManager() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.GameManager
Constructor for the GameManager class.
GameServerInstance - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server
The GameServerInstance class represents an instance of the game server that manages interactions with multiple clients (handlers) and processes messages related to the game state.
GameServerInstance() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.GameServerInstance
Constructs a GameServerInstance initializing the message queue and starting the message processing thread.
GameState - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
This enum class represents all the possible state of a game.
GameStateMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
Message sent from server to client to communicate the current game state.
GameStateMessage(int, GameState) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.GameStateMessage
Constructs a GameStateMessage with the specified client ID and game state.

Generates a map of the resources and their counts in the player's ground.
